name: LCC Infotech Limited
summary: LCC Infotech Limited, through its subsidiary, eLCC Info.com Limited, engages in the business of computer training and education, English training, etc. in India. It provides certificate courses, diploma courses, and advance diploma in the areas of software, financial accounts, hardware and networking, and graphic designing and multimedia; skill courses in the areas of beauty and wellness, electronics, and retail, as well as apparel, made-up, and home furnishing; and competitive courses. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Kolkata, India.
